title: Pleiochiton parasiticum
taxonomy: Pleiochiton parasiticum is a species of flowering plant in the family Gonolobaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the water-shoulder family. This family is further classified under the suborder Celastrineae in the order Oxalidales. The species Pleiochiton parasiticum itself is a part of the genus Pleiochiton, which consists of various species of flowering plants. The classification of this plant is a part of its taxonomy, which helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other organisms. As a member of the family Gonolobaceae, Pleiochiton parasiticum is closely related to other plants in this family, which are also native to tropical regions.
